summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Dashboard conditional states and project selector. All 11 features verified working correctly with 100% pass rate. Dashboard correctly shows 'Get your first AI Valuation' hero for projects with 0 valuations and 'Your Startup Exit Command Center' + ExitSnapshot + Chart + Boost for projects with valuations.

minor.issue: Returns 500 if valuation data doesn't match expected schema (missing fields like 'stage', 'low', 'high', 'methodology', etc). Fixed test data to match schema.

passed_tests: Dashboard - hero shows 'Get your first AI Valuation' when active project has 0 valuations ✓
Dashboard - hero shows 'Your Startup Exit Command Center' when active project has valuations ✓
Dashboard - 'Start Valuation' CTA appears in first-valuation hero (data-testid='start-valuation-cta') ✓
Dashboard - first-valuation hero shows stats: '5 min', '3+', 'PDF' (data-testid='first-valuation-hero') ✓
Dashboard - Exit Snapshot card appears when hasValuations=true ✓
Dashboard - ValuationOverTimeChart only shows when hasValuations=true ✓
Dashboard - ValuationBoostOpportunities only shows when hasValuations=true ✓
Dashboard - project selector dropdown appears when multiple projects (data-testid='project-selector') ✓
Dashboard - selecting different project updates dashboard content ✓
Dashboard - default active project is most recently updated ✓
Dashboard - project cards still display in both states ✓
Dashboard - project selector hidden when only 1 project ✓
Dashboard - Start Valuation CTA navigates to correct project valuation page ✓

features_verified: activeProject determined by selectedProjectId or most recently updated (sorted by updated_at desc)
Conditional hero: 'Get your first AI Valuation' when !hasValuations, 'Your Startup Exit Command Center' when hasValuations
first-valuation-hero shows stats (5 min, 3+, PDF) and Start Valuation CTA
Project selector (data-testid='project-selector') only shows when projects.length > 1
Project cards always display when projects exist

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard conditional logic correctly implemented per requirements
activeProject defaults to most recently updated using updated_at || created_at sorting
Project selector uses native <select> element styled appropriately
All required data-testids present for testing

test_credentials.multi_project_user: session_conditional_1772296883342 (user with 2 projects - 'Project With Valuations' has 2 valuations $10M/$7.5M, 'Project Without Valuations' has 0)

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test users: 1) user_conditional_dashboard_1772296883342 with 2 projects (one with valuations, one without), 2) user_single_project_1772297040847 with 1 project and no valuations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard conditional states fully tested and working. Key test IDs: dashboard, first-valuation-hero, start-valuation-cta, project-selector, exit-snapshot-card. When hasValuations=false: shows blue gradient hero with 5min/3+/PDF stats and Start Valuation CTA. When hasValuations=true: shows ExitSnapshot, ValuationOverTimeChart, ValuationBoostOpportunities. Project selector only visible when >1 projects. Default project is most recently updated by updated_at.
